errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `MirrorDescent.marginal_oracle` overrides parent class `Estimator` in an inconsistent manner
  `MirrorDescent.marginal_oracle` is read-only, but `Estimator.marginal_oracle` is read-write
errors.concise_description: Class member `MirrorDescent.marginal_oracle` overrides parent class `Estimator` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `MirrorDescent._init` overrides parent class `Estimator` in an inconsistent manner
  `MirrorDescent._init` has type `(self: MirrorDescent, domain: Domain, loss_fn: MarginalLossFn, known_total: float, *, potentials: CliqueVector | None = None, warm_start: Unknown | None = None, constraints: tuple[()] | Unknown = ...) -> MirrorDescentState`, which is not assignable to `(self: MirrorDescent, domain: Domain, loss_fn: MarginalLossFn, known_total: float, **kwargs: Any) -> Any`, the type of `Estimator._init`
  Signature mismatch:
  ..., **kwargs: Any) -> Any: ...
        ^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^ return type
        |
        parameters
  ..., *, potentials: CliqueVector | None = None, warm_start: Unknown | None = None, constraints: tuple[()] | Unknown = ...) -> MirrorDescentState: ...
        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
        |
        parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `MirrorDescent._init` overrides parent class `Estimator` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `MirrorDescent._finalize` overrides parent class `Estimator` in an inconsistent manner
  `MirrorDescent._finalize` has type `(self: MirrorDescent, state: MirrorDescentState, known_total: float, constraints: tuple[()] | Unknown = ...) -> MarkovRandomField`, which is not assignable to `(self: MirrorDescent, state: Any, known_total: float, constraints: tuple[()] | Unknown = ...) -> Model`, the type of `Estimator._finalize`
  Signature mismatch:
  ..., state: Any, known_total: float, constraints: tuple[()] | Unknown = ...) -> Model: ...
              ^^^ parameters                                                       ^^^^ return type
  ..., state: MirrorDescentState, known_total: float, constraints: tuple[()] | Unknown = ...) -> MarkovRandomField: ...
              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ parameters                                                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
errors.concise_description: Class member `MirrorDescent._finalize` overrides parent class `Estimator` in an inconsistent manner
